title: Pillowy Venezuelan Chicken Wrap
description: Delicious and flavorful Venezuelan-inspired chicken wrap with pillowy flatbread, marinated chicken, and spices.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together 2 tablespoons of olive oil, 1 teaspoon of paprika, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast the pillowy flatbread on the grill or in a toaster.
6. Spread 1-2 tablespoons of vegan mayonnaise on each flatbread, if using.
7. Slice the grilled chicken into thin strips.
8. Assemble the wraps by placing the chicken strips on the flatbread, followed by sliced red onion, chopped cilantro, and a sprinkle of paprika.
